heading: Step 1: Ensure that your index definition uses the  type.
body:
If your index definition uses the [knnVector](fts-data-types-knn-vector) type to index vector fields, replace
`knnVector` in your index definition with the [vector index type](bson-data-types-vector) type. To learn more, see
[Migrate to vector Type](migrate-knnVector-to-vector).
